---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for QueryPilot
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem you're trying to solve**
What can't you do today, or what would be easier?

**Proposed solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Mock-ups welcome.

**Alternatives considered**

**Which area does this fit?** (tick one)
- [ ] Core SQL features (v6/v7)
- [ ] Enterprise Console (v8)
- [ ] Learning Hub curriculum (v9 — new module / lesson / quiz?)
- [ ] PWA / mobile / offline
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Will it stay free / offline / no-AI?**
QueryPilot is committed to 100% free, 100% offline, no AI API. Does your idea fit that?

**Anything else**
